metadata.notes: Multilingual manifest with EN questions/options; HE/RU placeholders flagged; risk bands/outcomes/CTAs included.

CTA_PROVIDE_REASSURANCE_AND_OPTIONAL_REF.label: Provide reassurance and optional referral to a sleep professional for screening.

CTA_ENCOURAGE_DIAGNOSTIC_SLEEP_TEST_OR_C.label: Encourage diagnostic sleep test or consultation with a sleep professional.

CTA_REFER_FOR_DIAGNOSTIC_SLEEP_TEST_ENCO.label: Refer for diagnostic sleep test; encourage evaluation with a sleep specialist.

CTA_ENCOURAGE_FOLLOW_UP_SLEEP_TEST_OR_CO.label: Encourage follow-up sleep test or consultation to restart therapy.

CTA_RECOMMEND_THERAPY_REASSESSMENT_DEVIC.label: Recommend therapy reassessment, device review, or exploration of alternative/complementary treatments.

CTA_MAINTAIN_FOLLOW_UP_OFFER_DISCUSSION_.label: Maintain follow-up; offer discussion on secondary or alternative treatment options if relevant.

questions.title_en: Full name
Date of birth (DD/MM/YYYY)
Email address
Referring dentist or clinic
Age
Gender
Height (cm)
Weight (kg)
Have you been diagnosed with sleep apnea?
Are you currently receiving any treatment for your sleep apnea?
Which type of treatment are you currently using?
Have you ever undergone surgery related to sleep apnea or airway breathing?
When was your most recent sleep study performed?
How long does it usually take you to fall asleep?
How many hours of sleep do you typically get per night?
How would you rate your overall sleep quality?
Do you snore loudly?
Has anyone observed you stop breathing, gasping, or choking during sleep?
Do you wake up feeling unrefreshed despite getting enough sleep?
Do you experience excessive daytime sleepiness?
Do you have trouble staying awake while driving?
Do you wake up with a headache?
Do you wake up frequently during the night?
Do you have trouble falling back asleep after waking up?
Do you wake up early in the morning and cannot fall back asleep?
Do you experience restless or disturbed sleep?
Do you grind your teeth at night?
Do you clench your jaw during sleep?
Do you wake up with jaw pain or stiffness?
Do you experience any of the following? (Select all that apply)
Do you have high blood pressure?
Do you have diabetes?
Do you have asthma or other breathing problems?
Do you have thyroid problems?
Do you have depression or anxiety?
Do you have any of the following medical conditions? (Select all that apply)
Do you take any medications for sleep?
Do you have nasal congestion or obstruction?
Do you have difficulty breathing through your nose?
Rate your nasal breathing during the day (1 = very poor, 5 = excellent)
Rate your nasal breathing at night (1 = very poor, 5 = excellent)
Rate your overall breathing comfort (1 = very poor, 5 = excellent)
How much difficulty do you have with general productivity?
How much difficulty do you have with social outcomes?
How much difficulty do you have with activity level?
How much difficulty do you have with vigilance?
How would you rate your overall quality of life?
What would you most like to improve about your sleep or health? (Select all that apply)
Is there anything else you would like us to know about your sleep or health?

next_step.label: Provide reassurance and optional referral to a sleep professional for screening.
Encourage diagnostic sleep test or consultation with a sleep professional.
Refer for diagnostic sleep test; encourage evaluation with a sleep specialist.
Encourage follow-up sleep test or consultation to restart therapy.
Recommend therapy reassessment, device review, or exploration of alternative/complementary treatments.
Maintain follow-up; offer discussion on secondary or alternative treatment options if relevant.
